thread.title: Embodied AI / VLA (具身智能)
thread.definitionDraft: Embodied AI / VLA brings the LLM/foundation-model paradigm into physical-world robot control: a single network sees images, hears natural-language instructions, and directly outputs robot actions, end-to-end fusing perception, understanding and execution.
thread.whyNow: Just as LLMs became foundation models for language, a general robot policy is becoming the robot foundation model for physical intelligence — one policy controls many robots and specializes to new tasks with little data. Three drivers: large cross-embodiment robot data (Open X-Embodiment), pretrained VLMs transferring web knowledge (RT-2), and a maturing open-source stack (Octo, OpenVLA, LeRobot, openpi).
thread.useBoundary: Focus on VLA models and robot foundation models for general manipulation/control. Exclude the specific autonomous-driving domain (autonomous-driving thread) and pure simulation/game RL agents.

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: RT-1: Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale
sources.whyRelevant: VLA 路线奠基：35M Transformer，图+语言指令→离散化机械臂动作，3Hz 实时。
sources.text:
RT-1: Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale

sources.title: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control
sources.whyRelevant: "VLA"一词代表作，把动作当文本 token 生成，联合微调 VLM 得涌现泛化。
sources.text:
RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control

"VLA"一词代表作，把动作当文本 token 生成，联合微调 VLM 得涌现泛化。

edges.evidenceNote: RT-2 在 RT-1 的离散动作 token 思路上，叠加预训练 VLM 的网络知识迁移。
OXE 的跨本体大数据训出 RT-2-X，OpenVLA 论文以 RT-2-X 为对比基线。
Octo 在 OXE 的 80 万 episodes 上预训练，是其数据底座。
OpenVLA 7B 用 7 倍更少参数，任务成功率绝对值超 RT-2-X 55B。
官博是 π0 论文的一手发布与愿景陈述。
π0.5 在 π0 基础上换两阶段训练，目标从"会做任务"升级到"泛化到全新家庭"。
π0 论文一作 Levine 在播客口述同一模型的架构与训练哲学。
openpi 是 π0/π0.5 论文的官方开源权重与代码实现。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 17 sources / 8 edges, all arXiv ids verified (2212.06817 RT-1, 2307.15818 RT-2, 2310.08864 Open X-Embodiment, 2405.12213 Octo, 2410.24164 π0, 2406.09246 OpenVLA, 2504.16054 π0.5). Boundary held vs autonomous-driving. Roles all >=2.
